title: calamintha alpina f. cuneata
intro: Calamintha alpina f. cuneata, also known as a variety of the alpine calamintha plant, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calamintha alpina f. cuneata include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving digestive issues, and promoting relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
